character_designs.name_cn: 北境攻城兵种通用多状态角色板
character_designs.identity: Reusable Northern Beastfolk Alliance siege troop modeling board covering breacher, shield-wall, tunneler, and wall-climber roles

body_and_face.species_lock: The board contains four recognizable beastfolk siege archetypes, each with explicit species proportion, facial traits, costume anchors, and tool logic.
body_and_face.shared_scale: All are physically stronger than ordinary human soldiers, but their scale varies by species: Blackfang and Ironhorn are heavy, Snowbadger is short and dense, Snowfeather is light and long-limbed.
body_and_face.shared_costume_logic: No uniform cloth army costume. Equipment is a practical siege system of cracked hide, heavy fur edge, bone lamellar plates, horn guards, old wood frames, rawhide rope, dark blood oath cord, blackstone snow dust, and old iron fasteners.
body_and_face.shared_expression: Threat and hardship read through body language, worn gear, frost-bitten skin or fur, tired eyes, and siege tools rather than villainous monster faces.
body_and_face.badge_policy: Existing Wanshou emblem language can only appear as a tiny bonewood oath knot, shield-back charm, drum-edge tag, or tool-carved wood sliver. It must not become a new badge, crest, logo, or banner.

constant_anchors: old iron nail and hoop fasteners
blackstone snow dust and frozen mud
ochre grass and wind-eroded brown palette
small restrained blue survival fire accent
tiny locked Wanshou bonewood emblem-language reference only as a physical object

state_designs.name_cn: 黑牙破门斧兵 / 破门状态
state_designs.episode_range: 08-10 border-wall siege and recurring Northern battle fragments
state_designs.species_and_body: Tall orc-like Blackfang beastfolk heavy infantry, exposed tusks, short thick neck, forward-heavy shoulders, thick fur across upper back, long powerful arms.
state_designs.silhouette: Triangular heavy breacher silhouette with horned helmet, broad shoulders, two-handed bone-handled axe or battering hammer, and low forward march.
state_designs.color_logic: Wind-eroded brown and beast-hide dark brown dominate; bone white and old iron define armor; dark blood red appears only in oath cord and worn weapon stains.
required_details: tusks must be visible but not cartoonish
helmet must use horn and bone rather than polished metal
weapon must read as door-breaking siege tool
stance should imply following mammoth or rhino impact, without requiring the beast to appear

state_designs.name_cn: 铁角盾墙兵 / 顶盾状态
state_designs.episode_range: 08-10 siege shield wall, shaman escort, and siege-engine protection shots
state_designs.species_and_body: Broad Ironhorn bovine beastfolk, short blunt horns, heavy chest, thick neck, low center of gravity, frost-coated muzzle and shoulder fur.
state_designs.silhouette: Wide rectangular shield-wall silhouette; half-person-height bone-and-old-iron shield dominates, with a short-handled hammer visible behind it.
state_designs.color_logic: Bone white shield and frost edge contrast with dark hide, frozen earth grey, old iron, and ochre rope; any blue fire reflection is tiny and low.
required_details: short blunt horns must read clearly
shield must feel heavy and practical, with arrow dents and scuffs
yak-fur neck guard differentiates the role from human wall soldiers
small Wanshou reference may hang on shield back only as physical charm

state_designs.name_cn: 雪獾掘地兵 / 破基状态
state_designs.episode_range: granary foundation, drainage ditch, snow pit, tunnel sabotage, and siege underside shots
state_designs.species_and_body: Short dense Snowbadger beastfolk with broad hands, strong claws, thick forearms, squat torso, and low crawling posture.
state_designs.silhouette: Low compact sapper silhouette with tool belt, blackstone wedge bag, bone shovel strapped to back, and inflated under-ice breathing bladder.
state_designs.color_logic: Frozen earth grey, dark hide, blackstone, bone white tools, and small ochre grass fibers; no bright magic.
required_details: short dense body proportion must be unmistakable
large claws and broad hands must read as functional digging anatomy
tool belt and breathing bladder must show the siege role
avoid making the model a cute animal mascot

state_designs.name_cn: 雪羽攀墙斥候 / 攀墙状态
state_designs.episode_range: wall climb, rope throw, gate-flag cut, and inner-latch sabotage shots
state_designs.species_and_body: Light Snowfeather eagle or crow beastfolk, long arms, narrow torso, feather pattern cloak, clawed hands and feet, sharp watchful face.
state_designs.silhouette: Diagonal climbing silhouette with one arm extended by grappling hook, feathered arm cape trailing, light bone bracer and rope spool visible.
state_designs.color_logic: Dark feather brown and smoke grey with bone white hooks and restrained ice-blue edge light; no large glowing wings or air force spectacle.
required_details: feather arm cape must be readable but not angelic
grappling hook and rope must dominate the role
pose should be wall-climbing or rope-throwing, not flying heroically
avoid turning the model into a noble shaman or fantasy ranger

detail_panels.purpose: Lock Blackfang breacher head and shoulder identity.
detail_panels.notes: Giant horn helmet, visible tusks, thick fur shoulder mantle, and bone shard armor.
Half-person-height shield with bone plates, old iron hoops, arrow dents, and rawhide back straps.

detail_panels.purpose: Keep breacher weapons as practical siege tools.
detail_panels.notes: Bone handles, old iron edges, door-splinter scratches, no polished ceremonial blades.
Blackstone wedge pouch, bone shovel, short chisel, under-ice breathing bladder, coarse rope.
Bone grappling hook, feather-pattern arm cape, light bone bracer, thin rawhide rope, short knife.

detail_panels.purpose: Carry faction continuity without redesigning the badge.
detail_panels.notes: Small bonewood oath knot, shield-back charm, drum-edge tag, or tool-carved sliver only.

detail_panels.purpose: Unify the shared Northern siege costume layer.
detail_panels.notes: Rawhide rope, dark blood oath cord, snow-mud leg wraps, old iron nails, weathered wood.

detail_panels.purpose: Carry project material and color continuity.
detail_panels.notes: Ochre grass, frozen earth grey, wind-eroded brown, dark hide, bone white, old wood, old iron, dark blood red, blue survival fire, blackstone snow dust.

negative_rules: all four models sharing the same body with swapped weapons
Bai Yi or Qingming visual language
